name: ravenclaude-core
description: Domain-neutral Team Lead + specialist-agents pattern for Claude Code: 14 specialists, 20 skills, a dispatch playbook, format/lint/test gates, hooks, rules, and templates. Includes the Capability Grounding Protocol (environment + decision-tree priors, alternate-methods enumeration, honest blocked-reporting), the Structured Output Protocol for handoffs, a Researcher meta-skill, and a comfort-posture dashboard that writes Claude Code permission rules per layer (user/local/project) and per permission on a 3-level deny/ask/allow scale. Slash commands: /init-agent-ready, /wrap, /set-posture.
